name: Airy Modern
tagline: Spacious modern light deck with floating panels, soft periwinkle surfaces, and product-strategy pacing.

palette.description: Soft periwinkle-white canvas with clean indigo type, pale blue panels, and restrained amber and green accents.

typography.style: Rounded modern sans pairing with generous spacing.

best_for: Product strategy, customer research, startup updates, planning workshops, and decks that need a polished but low-pressure feel.
avoid_for: Hard-charging sales decks, dark executive briefings, or dense financial reporting.

source_inspiration.name: Light & Modern Slides for Clean Presentations
source_inspiration.notes: Original HTML template rebuilt from public visual direction only; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
